location_description: Offshore coastal waters around Whitley Bay, Cullercoats and Tynemouth

reference_point.description: Near Whitley Bay / Panama Swimming Club

sample_area.description: Wider ERA5 coastal box for the North Tyneside coast

source: Copernicus Climate Data Store ERA5 hourly data on single levels
sample_method: ERA5 sea surface temperature sampled once per day at 11:00 UTC, averaged across a North Tyneside coastal grid box and converted from Kelvin to Celsius.
